title: デビュー戦の後に・次はデッカく！

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ha. Haha. Hahaha! I did it... That wasn't so bad...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right! That's my debut done! Pretty good,
right, Trainer?!
choice_data_list: Yeah. I didn't see any problems.
Yeah. I didn't see any problems.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? Heh. There was nothin' to be afraid
of in the first place.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm aimin' to be the coolest Umamusume around,
after all! Mwahaha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite being proud of her victory, her face looks
strained. I guess she was pretty nervous.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The problem is what happens from here on out.
Sorry, but I'm in no mood to take my time rackin'
up awards.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Big shots have their own way of doin' things! You
know what race I'm shootin' for next, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her next race... If she's really ready to push for it,
the next step would be graded races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Graded races go from G3 up to G1, and the
opponents get stronger each rank. So if she's
looking for a new goal after her debut...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Are you making fun of me? An easy race like that
is yawn city.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Not bad, but it's still not enough for me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Bullseye! I'm gonna blow everyone away with my
awesome speed at my first G1! Sounds perfect for
me, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna amaze the whole world! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So, Trainer, what's the next junior G1 race?
choice_data_list: Either the Hanshin J.F. or the Asahi Hai F.S.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
These two major junior G1 races are held during
the same week. I tell her that both are mile races
and have the same conditions.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. So it's really just about which one I wanna
do. J.F. or F.S.?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've got a good feelin' about the J.F.! There's just
somethin' cool about how it sounds!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I dunno what the initials stand for, but let's do it!
Next target: the Hanshin J.F.!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
J.F. stands for "Juvenile Fillies," but I'll keep that
to myself. I have a feeling she won't remember
even if I tell her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, we've decided her next goal: The
Hanshin J.F.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Vodka! I heard you're going to run in the Hanshin
Juvenile Fillies!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yup. Got anythin' to say to the Umamusume tryin'
for G1 in her junior year?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You gotta have somethin', right? Like, "I figured
you would," or, "That's amazing!" Go ahead, say
it.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: ...Pfft. Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, c'mon! Don't just stand there snortin'! Don't
get full of yourself just 'cause ya can say the race
name right!
